abilities.name: Ember Vigil
abilities.text: You hold steady in dangerous sectors where other operatives would let the pressure own the pace.

abilities.name: Ash Psalm
abilities.text: When the line is clear, your rites turn the moment into discipline instead of relief.

abilities.name: Bone Bell
abilities.text: The first time escalation spikes on your turn, answer it with a prayer that keeps the breach honest.

abilities.name: Cinder Oath
abilities.text: Core-ward confrontations never feel routine, but your vows make them survivable.
